data.body:
➜ compactor git:(main) ✗ kno doctor --fix
Doctor
        lock_health:  ✓ repo/cache locks are acquirable
           worktree:  ✓ knots worktree is clean
             remote:  ✓ origin reachable; knots branch exists
            version:  ✓ v0.14.0 is up to date
              hooks:  ✓ sync hooks installed
  workflow_registry:  ✓ work=work_sdlc, gate=gate_sdlc, lease=lease_sdlc, explore=explore_sdlc, execution_plan=execution_plan_sdlc
     schema_version:  ✓ schema version 17 is current
       stuck_leases:  ✓ no stuck leases
   terminal_parents:  ✓ no parent knots require terminal reconciliation
cold_tier_imbalance:  ⚠ 30 hot / 1 cold; run doctor --fix to rehydrate up to 1
       skills_codex:  ✓ Codex managed skills installed at /Users/cartine/compactor/.agents/skills
      skills_claude:  ✓ Claude managed skills installed at /Users/cartine/compactor/.claude/skills
    skills_opencode:  ✓ OpenCode managed skills installed at /Users/cartine/.config/opencode/skills
➜ compactor git:(main) ✗
data.title: kno doctor --fix not handling cold_tier_imbalance edge case
